# Search

Full-text (Tantivy) and semantic (ChromaDB) search behind one engine that hides its backends.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.search` | XL | 12 | 3 |

## Public API

### `lithos.search`
- class `SearchResult` — A search result.
- class `SemanticResult` — A semantic search result.
- class `IndexableDocument` — The slice of a note the search seam consumes.
- class `ReconcileAction` — One action a search-engine reconcile would take.
- class `ReconcileFailure` — A backend that errored while applying a reconcile action.
- class `SearchReconcilePlan` — The dry-run output of :meth:`SearchEngine.plan_reconcile_to`.
- class `SearchReconcileResult` — The outcome of applying a :class:`SearchReconcilePlan`.
- class `Healthy` — The search engine is operational.
- class `Unhealthy` — The search engine is degraded; ``reason`` is a short human-readable string.
- def `reciprocal_rank_fusion` — Merge ranked lists of doc IDs using Reciprocal Rank Fusion.
- def `chunk_text` — Split text into chunks at paragraph boundaries.
- class `TantivyIndex` — Tantivy full-text search index.
- def `generate_snippet` — Generate a snippet showing query terms in context.
- class `ChromaIndex` — ChromaDB semantic search index.
- class `SearchEngine` — Combined search engine with full-text and semantic search.

## Dependencies

- Depends on: [Config](Config.md), [Errors](Errors.md), [Graph](Graph.md), [Telemetry](Telemetry.md)
- Used by: [CognitiveMemory](CognitiveMemory.md), [Entrypoints](Entrypoints.md), [Intake](Intake.md), [Knowledge](Knowledge.md), [LCMA](LCMA.md)

## Data stores

- `chroma_index` — Semantic index (ChromaDB + embeddings)
- `tantivy_index` — Full-text index (Tantivy)
